case_title: COUNTY CREDIT CONTROL COMPANY, A CORPORATION vs. LUMAS, ELISABETH et al

docket_entries.description: COMMON COUNTS/OPEN BOOK ACCOUNT/COLLECTIONS, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF COUNTY CREDIT CONTROL COMPANY, A CORPORATION AS TO DEFENDANT LUMAS, ELISABETH DOES 1 TO 10 INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED STATUS CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR          AUG-28-1998 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  JUN-23-1998 STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT DUE ON       AUG-10-1998
NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL COURT TRIAL SET FOR NOV-20-1998 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 206
STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF AUG-28-1998, OFF CALENDAR NO OBJECTION TO TRIAL SETTING.
MEMO TO SET RETURNED TO PLTF; CASE IS UNDER TRIAL DELAY.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LUMAS, ELISABETH $1,532.43 PRINCIPAL, $383.10 ATTORNEY FEES, $126.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,041.53, INTEREST AT 10% FROM DATE OF JUDGMENT.
CLERKS NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND AFFIDAVIT OF MAILING FILED
EXECUTION FOR MONEY ISSUED TO MARIN COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT LUMAS, ELISABETH
COST BILL, $.00 CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED, $.56 INTEREST, $.00 COSTS FILED BY PLAINTIFF COUNTY CREDIT CONTROL COMPANY, A CORPORATION

COURT TRIAL CHANGED BY CLERK FROM 1/22/99 TO 1/25/98 TO CONFORM WITH MEMO OF PRESIDING JUDGE DATED 10/2/98, TO HAVE TRIALS SET TO MONDAYS, FOR TRIALS AFTE 1/4/99, IN DEPT. 206. TO BE IN DEPT. 206. PLFF'S CSL, BARRY THOMPSON, CALLED & RESET DATE IS TO 1/25/99,9AM, DEPT. 206. PLFF TO GIVE NOTICE.

RM 504 GEORGE CHOPPELAS, JUDGE, MAUREEN BRADY, CSR, CLACY, CLERK. CAUSE CALLED FOR UNCONTESTED COURT TRIAL. BARRY THOMPSON FOR PLAINTIFF, NO APPEARANCE FOR DEFENDANT. PLAINTIFF'S DIRECT EXAMINATION OF WITNESSES AND INTRODUCTION OF DOCUMENTARY EVIDENCE. PLAINTIFF RESTS. COURT RENDERS JUDGMENT FOR PLAINTIFF, DETAILS ON RECORD AND IN CLERK'S MINUTES.
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR MONEY ISSUED TO MARIN COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, UNSATISFIED AS TO DEFENDANT LUMAS, ELISABETH

DEPT X-4, JUDGE ALEX SALDAMANDO, BRENDA PAYTON, CLERK, VALERIE PAPALE, CSR. BARRY R. THOMPSON, ESQ. APPEARED ON BEHALF OF THE PLAINTIFF. THERE WAS NO APPEARANCE BY THE DEFENDANT. PLAINTIFF NANCY JEANNE DRURY WAS SWORN & EXAMINED BY HER COUNSEL. SINCE THERE WAS SOME CONFUSION AS TO WHETHER THE DEFENDANT WAS SERVED AT THE CORRECT, ADDRESS, THE COURT TOOK THE MATTER OFF CALENDAR UNTIL SUCH TIME AS THE DEFEND- ANT IS DEFINITELY SERVED AT A CORRECT ADDRESS WHEN THAT IS ASCERTAINED.
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF COUNTY CREDIT CONTROL COMPANY, A CORPORATION SERVED JUN-08-1998, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT LUMAS, ELISABETH
ANSWER TO COMPLAINT FILED BY DEFENDANT LUMAS, ELISABETH
COURT TRIAL CONTINUED TO JAN-25-1999 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 206 PER ORDER AT TRIAL, PLFF TO GIVE NOTICE.
SET FOR STATUS CONFERENCE HEARING SET FOR FEB-19-1999 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPT 212 BY THE COURT
NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL COURT TRIAL SET FOR APR-12-1999 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 206
